headline: Is United Airlines (UAL) Still Attractive After A 60% One Year Share Price Gain
summary: Wondering if United Airlines Holdings is still attractively priced after a strong run, or if most of the upside is already reflected in the share price? The stock last closed at US$92.21, with returns of 4.3% over 7 days, 0.2% over 30 days, an 18.4% decline year to date, and 59.9% over 1 year, which gives you mixed signals on risk and reward. Recent headlines have focused on United's ongoing efforts to refine its network, manage costs, and respond to shifts in travel demand. These factors...
